summary: Completed frontend testing of enhanced My Pets page. All 7 features verified working correctly including pet cards, edit mode, Health Vault expansion, and Pet Soul Answers section.

minor.issue: 520 errors observed in console logs (intermittent server errors)

critical_code_review_comments: Edit button uses lucide-square-pen icon class (not lucide-edit) - this is fine but worth noting for future test scripts
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with 3 pets (Mojo, Mystique, Luna)
context_for_next_testing_agent: My Pets page fully functional. Edit mode uses lucide-square-pen for edit icon, lucide-trash2 for delete, lucide-x for cancel, lucide-check for save. Mojo has 57% soul score, 2 vaccines, 2 active medications.

pet_cards_display.description: Pet cards show photo placeholder, name, breed, species, gender
pet_cards_display.evidence: 3 pets displayed: Mojo (Indie, Dog, Male), Mystique (Shihtzu, Dog, Female), Luna

edit_delete_buttons.description: Each pet card has Edit (pencil/square-pen) and Delete (trash) buttons
edit_delete_buttons.evidence: Found 3 edit buttons and 3 delete buttons for 3 pets

inline_editing.description: Clicking Edit enables inline editing with input fields and dropdowns
inline_editing.evidence: Name input, Breed input, Species dropdown, Gender dropdown all editable

health_vault_expansion.description: Health Vault section expands to show vaccines and medications summary
health_vault_expansion.evidence: Mojo: 2 Vaccinations (Rabies 6/15/2026, DHPP Due soon), 2 Active Medications (Nexgard 68mg, TEST_Heartgard 50mg)

pet_soul_expansion.description: Pet Soul Answers section expands with progress bar
pet_soul_expansion.evidence: Mojo shows 57% progress bar, 'Continue Building Soul' button visible

edit_mode_buttons.description: Edit mode has Cancel (X) and Save (checkmark) buttons
edit_mode_buttons.evidence: Cancel button (lucide-x) and Save button (lucide-check) both visible and functional

date_pickers.description: Birthday and Gotcha Day fields are editable date pickers in edit mode
date_pickers.evidence: 2 date picker inputs found - Birthday (01/29/2026) and Gotcha Day (01/31/2026)

travel_hidden_from_navbar.description: Travel is NOT visible in main navbar (only in footer)
travel_hidden_from_navbar.evidence: Navbar shows: Celebrate, Dine, Stay, Care, Enjoy, Fit, More. Travel only in footer.
